title: service-accounts — published macros
description: This module publishes NO macros. Every SA-related capability is exposed via a service binding (SecretRotator, ServiceAccountJwtIssuer, DormantAccountDetector, ServiceAccountFingerprinter) OR a validation rule (valid_service_account_name, valid_kid_format), never as a global helper or Blueprint extension.
rationale: Every consumer of the SA substrate goes through the platform-admin HTTP surface OR the token-exchange endpoint OR the DI-bound repository — there is no legitimate use case for a Blueprint::service_account_fields macro because the `service_accounts` table is owned by exactly ONE migration in this module.

The pattern set by `identity::Blueprint::identity_fields` exists because MULTIPLE downstream models (User, PlatformUser) legitimately reuse the credential-column shape. No downstream table reuses the SA-column shape; every machine credential lives on this single table.
